MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Van Hedwall.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Tery Levy , is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-16-2010 is vacated.
